[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100101101 5
1 1101001101 6
2 1000111101 6
3 0000000000 a
4 0100110100 4
5 1011110011 7
6 1001010000 3
7 0100100001 3

01 10 0000110000 2
12 21 1001010000 3 match 6
23 32 0000000000 a match 3
34 43 0100000000 1
45 54 0100000000 1
56 65 0100001101 4
67 76 1000001101 4
70 07 0000110100 3

02 20 0000010000 1
13 31 0000100001 2
24 42 0001000000 1
35 53 0100100001 3 match 7
46 64 0101000000 2
57 75 0000101101 4
60 06 0100000100 2
71 17 1000110001 4

03 30 0100100000 2
14 41 0001000010 2
25 52 0000000000 a match 3
36 63 0100000001 2
47 74 0000000000 a match 3
50 05 0100100100 3
61 16 1001000001 3
72 27 1000010000 2

04 40 0100000000 1
15 51 0000100001 2
26 62 1001000000 2
37 73 0000100001 2
